S.FORM: Peru Itini i 10 00 S, 76 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Peru. Polong no sekalay i 1,285,216 sq km "saka 20 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,279,996 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 5,220 sq km " Polong i 30,741,062 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 18.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 53%, malo no roma to a sera 28.20%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakapito 28 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski , patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 28 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, *,***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakapito~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i p…ô…¨~…ģro~u pab~b~v…ĺo~u ko~u~u ¶*jnski , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Peru Itini i 10 00 S, 76 00 W, noNotimolan Amilika ko Peru. Polong no sekalay i 1,285,216 sq km "saka 20 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 1,279,996 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 5,220 sq km " Polong i 30,741,062 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 18.80%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 53%, malo no roma to a sera 28.20%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakapito 28 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Pedro Pablo Kuczynski , patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 28 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
